datasheet.text: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase , when you select this model’s unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered , each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll .
datasheet.name: Hatred Eternal (Pain)

datasheet.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly DRUKHARI unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
datasheet.name: Overlord

datasheet.text: Once per battle round , one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
datasheet.name: Devious Mastermind

entries.label: This model's splinter pistol can be replaced with one of the following:
This model’s huskblade can be replaced with one of the following:

entries.text: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase , when you select this model’s unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered , each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll .
entries.name: Hatred Eternal (Pain)

entries.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly DRUKHARI unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
entries.name: Overlord

entries.text: Once per battle round , one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
entries.name: Devious Mastermind

entries.text: You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.
entries.label: Shadowfield

entries.text: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. The first time the bearer makes a melee attack that destroys an enemy model, after all the bearer’s attacks have been resolved, until the end of the battle, add an additional 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.
entries.label: Soul Trap
